children.heading: Approval
children.label: a Approval
children.text: The Secretary shall submit each plan prepared pursuant to to the Congress, together with the Secretary’s recommendations, including recommendations for authorizing legislation, if needed.section 2222 of this title

children.heading: Pacific Northwest region
children.label: b Pacific Northwest region
children.text: A contingency plan under subsection (a) for the State of Washington, Oregon, Idaho, or Montana, may be approved by the Secretary only at the request of the Governor of the affected State in coordination with the other States in the region and the Administrator of the Bonneville Power Administration.
